title: Spicy Saudi Pilaf with Datterini Tomatoes
description: A flavorful and aromatic Saudi-style pilaf dish infused with the spicy kick of fiery peppers, served with sweet datterini tomatoes.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add sliced fiery peppers and cook until slightly softened.
Add pilaf and stir to coat with oil.
Add datterini tomatoes and stir to combine.
Sprinkle arabian spices and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 15 minutes.
Fluff pilaf with a fork and serve hot, garnished with crispy onions.
